activities.name: Table_And_File_List
activities.description: This Lookup is used to get the list of tables and files from metastore

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT  
    td.DBName,  
    td.TableName,  
    td.SchemaName,  
    td.FileName,  
    td.SourceType,  
    td.WatermarkColumn,  
    td.WatermarkValue 
FROM Metastore.Table_Details td  
LEFT JOIN (  
    SELECT  
        table_name,  
        file_name,  
        MAX(job_end_date) AS max_job_end_date  
    FROM Metastore.Pipeline_Details  
    WHERE table_load_status = 'Succeeded'
    GROUP BY table_name, file_name  
) pd  
ON ISNULL(td.TableName, '') = ISNULL(pd.Table_name, '') 
AND ISNULL(td.FileName, '') = ISNULL(pd.file_name, '')  -- Handling NULL file names  
WHERE  
    (
        pd.max_job_end_date IS NULL  -- Table was never loaded  
        OR  
        pd.max_job_end_date < DATEADD(HOUR, -24, GETDATE())  -- Last load was over 24 hours ago  
    )
    AND td.SourceType = '@{pipeline().parameters.source_name}';

activities.name: Each_Table_Or_File
activities.description: This ForEach is used to iterate through each table or file one at a time parallelly

activities.name: File_Or_SQL
activities.description: This Switch is used to execute a certain case for certain Source Type

activities.name: Landing_To_Bronze
activities.description: This Copy Activity is used to copy over all the folders and files from the Landing Zone to the Bronze Zone

activities.name: Base_Pipeline
activities.description: This Execute Pipeline Activity is used to execute the main pipeline

activities.name: Success_Email
activities.description: This Web Activity is used to Send a "Success" mail to the user through Logic Apps

body.value:
{
  "subject": "Data Pipeline Execution Succeeded with run ID @{pipeline().RunId}",
  "message": "We are pleased to inform you that the pipeline execution has successfully completed.",
  "dataFactoryName":"@{pipeline().DataFactory}",
  "pipelineName":"@{pipeline().Pipeline}",
  "receiver": "@{pipeline().parameters.receiver}",
  "status": "@{activity('Base_Pipeline').status}",
  "bronzetosilver": "Successful",
  "silvertogold": "Successful"
}

activities.name: Failed_Email
activities.description: This Web Activity is used to Send a "Failed" mail to the user through Logic Apps

body.value:
{
  "subject": "Data Pipeline Execution Failed with run ID @{pipeline().RunId}",
  "message": "Unfortunately, the pipeline execution has failed. Please see the details below:",
  "dataFactoryName":"@{pipeline().DataFactory}",
  "pipelineName":"@{pipeline().Pipeline}",
  "receiver": "@{pipeline().parameters.receiver}",
  "status": "@{activity('Base_Pipeline').status}",
  "bronzetosilver": "@{if(contains(activity('Base_Pipeline').output.pipelineReturnValue, 'BronzeToSilverUrl'), activity('Base_Pipeline').output.pipelineReturnValue.BronzeToSilverUrl, 'No URL Available')}",
  "silvertogold": "@{if(contains(activity('Base_Pipeline').output.pipelineReturnValue, 'SilverToGoldUrl'), activity('Base_Pipeline').output.pipelineReturnValue.SilverToGoldUrl, 'No URL Available')}"
}
